sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports fatigue for the past two months and a headache. The patient also reports nasal congestion due to seasonal allergies. The patient denies blood in stool.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The clinician finds a slight two out of six systolic ejection murmur. Trace pitting edema is present to the lower extremities bilaterally.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The clinician suspects cervical radiculopathy. The patient's blood pressure readings have been high weekly, monthly, and spiked during travel.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The clinician plans a cervical MRI. The clinician plans to increase lisinopril to 40 milligrams once a day. The clinician plans to monitor blood pressure readings through the patient portal. The clinician plans to add a second agent if necessary.
